name: PENI PARKER
description: Peni Parker may be young, but she bravely stands on the frontlines to protect the Web of Life and Destiny. Together, this teen prodigy and her state-of-the-art mech, the sensational SP//dr, make for the most thrilling duo on the battlefield!
lore: After the death of her father, Peni Parker inherited the experimental mech-suit known as SP//dr. In order to control the suit, Peni had to allow herself to be bitten by the irradiated arachnid that controls its CPU, forming a psychic bond between them. Now, Peni and SP//dr keep the people of Tokyo Webworld safe, just like her father did before her. But their mission is bigger than just one city. Since the Timestream Entanglement, Peni and SP//dr have devoted themselves to the protection of the Web of Life and Destiny and the countless realities it connects.

stats.Casting: Rapid-fire, delayed projectile that is accompanied by a spell field

abilities.name: Spider-Sweeper
abilities.description: Enhance the SP//dr suit, launching up enemies in its path and deploying Arachno-Mines, Spider-Drones, and Cyber-Webs repeatedly

stats.Special Effect: Gain 450 Bonus Health and a 70% Movement Boost

abilities.name: Bionic Spider-Nest
abilities.description: Generate a Bionic Spider-Nest at a targeted area, periodically spawning Spider-Drones and creating Cyber-Webs. While in the Cyber-Web, Peni and allies gain Healing Over Time and a Movement Boost. Excess healing converts into Bonus Health. Spider-Drones inflict a Slow effect on hit, which can stack and refresh its effect period with multiple hits

stats.Special Effect: Two Spider-Drones are generated every 3s, slows hit enemies by 8% for 2s, each hit stacks the effect and resets the slow period, stacking up to 40%

abilities.name: Arachno-Mine
abilities.description: Deploy Arachno-Mines that can be concealed within the confines of a Cyber-Web

stats.Cooldown: 4 charges, with each charge taking 4s to recharge

abilities.name: Cyber-Bond
abilities.description: Shoot a web strand that links to the targeted area or Cyber-Web. If stretched too far, it will trigger a pullback

stats.Maximum Cyber-Bond Distance: 19m, with the possibility to exceed this distance if descending

abilities.name: Wall Crawl
abilities.description: HOLD Jump to crawl on vertical surfaces

abilities.name: Cyber-Web Snare
abilities.description: Cast futuristic webbing that Immobilizes enemies or creates a Cyber-Web. While in the Cyber-Web, Peni and allies gain Healing Over Time and a Movement Boost. Excess healing converts into Bonus Health

stats.Special Effect 1: Enemies hit are ensnared for 0.7s. While trapped in the Cyber-Web, Peni Parker receives 25 healing per second. Any excess healing is converted into Bonus Health, up to a maximum of 200 Health, and grants a 25% Movement Boost
stats.Special Effect 2: Allies in Peni's Cyber-Webs now receive the same Healing Over Time and a Movement Boost effects as her. Movement Boost for allies is 25%, Healing is 15/s. Ally excess healing converts into Bonus Health, up to 25

received.name: ARMORIZED SPIDER-NEST
received.description: Enhanced by Rocket Raccoon, Peni Parker’s Bionic Spider-Nest regularly generates strengthened armor packs. Each armor pack grants bonus health to the hero who picks up the pack. Peni Parker can deploy Bionic Spider-Nest and Armored Spider-Nest at the same time

received.name: Cyber-Spiders
received.description: Peni Parker whips up a Sticky Bomb for Spider-Man! Prime it, then toss it before the timer's up for a blast that damages nearby enemies and attaches a Spider-Tracer to them. If not thrown in time, it explodes on Spider-Man, recharging a Web-Cluster shot and granting Bonus Health

base.description: Upon activation, briefly grants Cyber-Web Clusteran Attack Speedand DamageBoost.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Black Panther, activating the ability deploys a frontal Vibranium Shield, while reducing the Vibranium Energy cost of Cyber-Web Cluster.

base.description: Deploy an Armored Spider-Nestthat periodically drops Spider-Dronesand Armor Packsthat grant Bonus Health.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Rocket Raccoon, the Armored Spider-Nestpassively regenerates its own Health. Furthermore, Rocket's B.R.B.will generate Cyber-Webs, and spawn both Spider-Dronesand Arachno-Mines.
